evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: scalable data models; reliable solutions; compliance with architecture standards; data quality; security standards
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Repeated emphasis on scalability, reliability, compliance, and quality indicates rigour orientation.
evidence.domain_risk: agribusiness; global operations; no explicit financial/regulatory language
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Large international agriculture company without financial reporting or compliance signals suggests moderate risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: product owners; IT specialists; business stakeholders
evidence.data_team_maturity: global data platform; established tooling; DevOps practices; coaching responsibilities
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Global infrastructure, multiple tools, and mentoring indicate mature data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: design and maintain scalable data models; comply with architecture and security standards; global data platform; coach colleagues
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical framing (scalable models, architecture compliance, CI/CD, DevOps) demonstrates hiring manager perspective.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Product-focused collaboration and platform user orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: translate requirements into solutions; maintain systems
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role frames as executing within established architecture, not setting direction.
evidence.testing_framing: ensure compliance with architecture standards; CI/CD practices
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Quality and testing framed as shared responsibility within DevOps practices.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: compliance with architecture standards; security standards; reliable solutions
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Repeated emphasis on compliance, architecture, and security indicates high loss aversion.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Scaling and maintenance of established infrastructure.
